entries.definition:
ṣ–k–k to slap with the hand, violent strike with a ringing
sound; to shut, to close. Of this root, one form, صَكَّت ṣakkat,
occurs once in the Qur’an.

صَكَّ ṣakka u [v. trans.] to slap, smack, smite with loud noise
(51:29) فَأَقْبَلَتِ امْرَأَتُهُ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا then his wife entered with a
loud cry, and struck her [own] face.
